productName: SF FIR TK - 1G - Blu Voodoo - Dessert - HYB - CR
description: This hybrid cartridge loads Blu Voodoo into a sleek 510-thread pen for clean, convenient draws — premium oil, precise hits, zero hassle. Flavor on the go, a balanced, sweet-earthy profile, leading into an even, best-of-both-worlds feel.
